summary: Iteration 40 - Enhanced Search Feature. Backend: 13/13 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All 18 UI tests PASS. New 'q' parameter searches by name, address, or comuna. Backend correctly combines $and for q + service_type to avoid MongoDB $or conflict. Home page SearchBar and Search page both updated with correct placeholder 'Buscar por nombre, dirección o comuna' and autocomplete suggestions. Provider 'Residencia Los Aromos' correctly found when searching 'Aromos'.

issues: Google Maps intentionally disabled - shows 'Mapa no disponible' placeholder which is acceptable

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers?q=Aromos finds provider by name (1 result)
GET /api/providers?q=Las+Condes finds providers by comuna (22 results)
GET /api/providers?q=Providencia finds providers by address (32 results)
GET /api/providers?q=Aromos&service_type=residencias combined filter works (1 result, no $or conflict)
GET /api/providers without q param returns all providers (263 total)
Backwards compatibility: comuna param still works
Empty search returns 0 results with total=0
Response has pagination fields (results, total, skip, limit)
Provider has services array in response
frontend_ui_tests: Home page placeholder: 'Buscar por nombre, dirección o comuna'
Home page service tabs exist (residencias, cuidado-domicilio, salud-mental)
Home page autocomplete shows suggestions on typing 'Las'
Home page autocomplete shows 'Las Condes' as first suggestion
Home page clicking suggestion fills input
Search page placeholder: 'Buscar por nombre, dirección o comuna...'
Search page service tabs exist (all, residencias, cuidado-domicilio, salud-mental)
Cuidado a Domicilio tab filters correctly (27 results)
Salud Mental tab filters correctly (24 results)
Combined search + service filter works (Aromos + Residencias = 1 result)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly uses $and when combining q param with service_type filter to avoid MongoDB $or conflict
SearchBar.jsx correctly fetches comunas on mount for autocomplete
SearchSimple.jsx uses 'q' param instead of just 'comuna' for broader search
Both components have correct placeholder text 'Buscar por nombre, dirección o comuna'
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Note: Google Maps disabled (API key requires billing) - acceptable fallback UI shown
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 263 providers in database including 'Residencia Los Aromos' in Viña del Mar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40: Enhanced Search COMPLETE. Backend GET /api/providers now accepts 'q' param that searches name/address/comuna. Uses $and to combine with service_type filter. Frontend Home page SearchBar and Search page SearchSimple both updated with autocomplete and new placeholder. 263 total providers in DB. Key test data: 'Residencia Los Aromos' in Viña del Mar. Google Maps intentionally disabled.

mocked_apis.notes: Google Maps API intentionally disabled (requires billing account) - placeholder shown
